title: [1.4.2-stable] Stop glob-ing on podman cp
body:
* Do not support wildcards on cp
* symlink processing and wildcarding led to unexpected files
  being copied

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

cherry-picked from https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/3942

comments.body:
I completely forgot to send this to you. Oops.

Sorry about that!

note: I dropped the test case that was added, as it was failing (I have no idea why and spent quite a bit of time thinking about it). It didn't seem to have to do with the glob fix, so I feel okay dropping it.
